title: Ubiquiti sector antenna AirMax MIMO 16dBi 5GHz, 120°, rocket kit
description: AM-5G16-120 airMAX Sector Antenna is a 16dBi Carrier Class 2x2 MIMO (Dual Polarity) Sector Antenna with 120° beam angle that was designed for 5GHz band and for integrate with Rocket M radios (RocketM sold separately). Every airMAX® Antenna has a built-in Rocketâ¢ mount , so no tools are needed to install the Rocket BaseStation. Package contains Antenna (2) RSMA male - RSMA male pigtail Holder + screws Antenna (2) RSMA male - RSMA male pigtail Holder + screws
